title: lycium carolinianum var. normale
intro: Lycium carolinianum var. normale, also known as Chinese wolfberry or Goji berry, is a type of shrub native to China and other parts of Asia, known for its edible red berries and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties. The medicinal properties of Lycium carolinianum var. normale include its ability to improve eye health, boost the immune system, and protect against age-related diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or dried berries, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine and modern health supplements.
